title: TaakHelden API Contract
description: Shape the taakhelden-architect agent emits when specifying a new/changed endpoint. Mirrors the conventions in docs/taakhelden-api-specificatie.md and the packages/shared Zod schemas.

resource.description: Resource name, e.g. reminders. Drives file names: packages/shared/src/schemas/<resource>.ts, apps/api/src/repo/<resource>.ts, apps/api/src/routes/<resource>.ts, apps/api/test/<resource>.test.ts.

role.description: Which authenticated role may call it (requireParent for parent-only).

sharedSchema.description: Name of the Zod schema exported from packages/shared for request + response validation.

repoFunction.description: The repo function that owns the SQL. Must take familyId as its first argument after the DB handle.

familyScoped.description: Every endpoint is family-scoped; queries filter family_id = ?. This is the security boundary.

idempotent.description: Required true for POST/PATCH/DELETE — mutations run through the Idempotency-Key header.

touchesLedger.description: If true, point changes are written through the FamilyRoom DO into points_ledger; no balance column is updated.

authzTest.description: Path to the required authz test proving cross-family denial + role gating.
